title: thelypteris leprieurii
intro: Thelypteris leprieurii is a species of fern native to tropical Africa, belonging to the family Thelypteridaceae and is commonly known as the 'Lepreri's fern' or 'African Lepreri's fern'. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Thelypteris leprieurii include its ability to treat various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions. Herbal preparations of the plant include infusions, decoctions, and ointments, which are used to treat various health issues, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness.
